name_cn:
Genuine quality
BVLGARI SERPENTI FOREVER
Model: 38102, Emerald
Size: 22*13*5.5cm
Best-selling Serpenti Forever series exquisite crossbody bag, original single quality, imported cowhide, custom original single hardware 🔅 embellished with serpentine enamel gold-plated snake head clasp, also suitable for evening wear 💎. Includes raincoat, mirror, and gift box packaging
